log: ══ ROUND 1 ══
--- Gem Dragonborn — Winged Striker --- HP: 67/67 | AC: 14
REASONING: ROUND 1: 1 enemies. Opening with Gem Flight + Hypnotic Pattern.
MOVEMENT: Flies up 20ft.
BONUS: Gem Flight activated (2/3 remaining). Flying for 10 rounds.
ACTION: Cast Hypnotic Pattern (Level 3 slot, 2 remaining). DC 16 WIS save. 30ft cube.
→ Archmage: WIS save [d20(ADV):15+6=21 vs DC 16] SUCCESS. Resists. (had advantage)
→ No targets affected. Spell wasted.
--- Archmage --- HP: 99/99 | AC: 15
REASONING: Cone of Cold on 1 targets! 8d8 cold damage.
ACTION: Cast Cone of Cold (Level 5 slot, 2 remaining). DC 17 CON save. 60ft cone.
→ Gem Dragonborn — Winged Striker: SUCCESS. 20 damage (half).
→ No targets affected. Spell wasted.

══ ROUND 2 ══
--- Archmage --- HP: 99/99 | AC: 15 | Cond: [charmed_hp, incapacitated]
** INCAPACITATED ** Cannot take actions.
--- Gem Dragonborn — Winged Striker --- HP: 36/67 | AC: 14 | Conc: Hypnotic Pattern
REASONING: All 1 enemies disabled by Hypnotic Pattern. Dodging to maintain concentration.
